final_prompt.prompt:
Create a sci-fi space scene (any in-image text in Chinese, if rendered).

Style/medium: needs a sci-fi space aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: framing is yours
Subject: must include an astronaut floating in Earth orbit, spacesuit details clear
Scene/backdrop: must include Earth orbit context, a brilliant galaxy and nebula behind the astronaut, partial space station structure at the image edge
Lighting/mood: needs light from Earth reflection creating a spectacular, awe-inspiring atmosphere — exact light source balance is yours
Color palette: needs a cosmic direction — exact hue values and saturation are yours
Materials/textures: needs detailed spacesuit surface treatment — exact material sheen and texture are yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: if any in-image text is rendered, default to Chinese
Avoid:
